label.name: Name
label.forgotPassword: Enter the email address you used to create your account, and click "Reset Password"

content.confirmPublishReportType: Publish this report to mobile application.
content.confirmUnpublishReportType: Unpublish this report from moible application.
content.confirmTransition: Are you want to change status to  {{stepName}} ?
content.confirmConvertToTest: Would like to change this report to test report?

message.resetPasswordRequestSuccess: We received a request to reset your password.
message.passwordMissmatch: The password and confirm password you entered don’t match.
requestToDelete: We have received your request to delete your account on our platform. Please be advised that upon processing your request, we will take the following actions:

All personal information associated with your account will be permanently deleted from our platform. This includes any data you have provided during registration or through your usage of the platform.

While we will erase your personal information, any reports you have created will be retained for legal and regulatory purposes. However, rest assured that your personal details will no longer be visible or accessible in connection with these reports. Your privacy remains a top priority, and we will ensure that your identity is anonymized in all retained documents accessible by authorities.
Should you have any concerns or questions regarding this process, please feel free to reach out to our support team at {{supportEmail}}. Your satisfaction and privacy are important to us.
Thank you for being a part of our community, and we wish you the best in your future endeavors.

censusDefinition.publishLifecycleTitle: Published versions are the mobile forms
censusDefinition.publishLifecycleBody: Open a census definition to edit its JSON, publish a new mobile form version, or activate and deactivate it for reporter mobile apps. Existing village submissions remain readable with the version they used.
censusDefinition.publishSuccess: {{kind}} census {{version}} is now the published mobile form. Reporters will receive it the next time the mobile app refreshes this census.
censusDefinition.saveDraftSuccess: {{kind}} census draft {{version}} was saved. It is not visible to reporter mobile apps until you publish it.
censusDefinition.deactivateSuccess: {{kind}} census is inactive. Reporter mobile apps will hide it, but existing submissions remain available.
censusDefinition.reactivateSuccess: {{kind}} census is active again. Reporters can open it after the mobile app refreshes.
censusDefinition.noPublishedVersion: No published version. Mobile will not show this census.
censusDefinition.deactivateHelp: Deactivating hides this census from reporter mobile apps. Existing submissions remain available.
censusDefinition.reactivateHelp: Reactivating makes the latest published version available to reporter mobile apps again.
censusDefinition.editingDraftHelp: Editing saved draft: v{{version}}. Publish when this draft is ready for mobile.
censusDefinition.noVersionHelp: No version is currently published for mobile.
censusDefinition.unpublishedEditsHelp: These authored schema edits are not visible to mobile reporters yet. Click Publish to generate the next active mobile form version.
censusDefinition.unsavedEditsHelp: Save this draft to keep working later, or publish to generate the next active mobile form version.
censusDefinition.inactiveHelp: This census is inactive and hidden from reporter mobile apps. Reactivate it before publishing a new version.

builder.title: Census form builder
builder.help: Define breakdowns and numeric measures. Rows are generated for mobile when this definition is published.
builder.displayHelp: Used as the row label when this census has no breakdown.
builder.displayWithBreakdownsHelp: Mobile row labels are generated from breakdown values.
builder.displayDisabledOverlay: This section is not used while breakdowns are defined. Mobile row labels come from the breakdown values below.
builder.breakdownsHelp: Breakdowns repeat the same measures over categories such as gender or species.
builder.noBreakdownHelp: Mobile will show one total row.
builder.translationHelp: Default is the fallback label. Add only the languages this form needs.
builder.keyReadOnlyHelp: Generated when added. Use Raw JSON mode to override.
builder.measureKeyReadOnlyHelp: Generated when added. Use Raw JSON mode to override.
builder.previewHelp: Read-only preview of the runtime rows mobile will receive after publish.
builder.rowsHelp: Rows shown to reporters on mobile.
builder.measuresHelp: Numbers collected on each row. Measures are integer and required.
builder.dimensionsHelp: Tags that describe this row for filtering and summaries. Reporters do not fill these in.
builder.noDimensions: No row tags for this row.
builder.complexDimensionHelp: Complex values are shown as JSON text. Use Raw JSON mode for precise editing.
builder.rowKeyReadOnlyHelp: Generated when the row is added. Use Raw JSON mode to override.
builder.activeSpeciesRowsTitle: Rows come from active Animal Species
builder.activeSpeciesRowsHelp: One row is created for each active species. Add, deactivate, or reorder species in the Animal Species page.
builder.animalWithoutSpeciesSource: This animal census uses fixed rows instead of active species rows.
builder.dimensionsReadOnly: Row tag data is preserved in JSON mode.
builder.measureScopeError: Only required integer measures are supported in the builder.
builder.deleteHelp: This change affects the next published mobile form. Existing submissions remain readable with the version they used.

validation.rowsRequired: At least one row is required.
validation.measuresRequired: At least one measure is required.
validation.keyPattern: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores only.
validation.valuesRequired: At least one value is required.
